title: NH Direct - Electronic Prior Authorization for Medications
problem: Electronic prior authorization for medications needs standardized workflows connecting providers, pharmacies, and payers.
solution: Electronic prior authorization services integrated with e-prescribing workflows. NCPDP SCRIPT standard compliance. Streamlined prior auth submission and response processing.
technology: NCPDP SCRIPT, e-prescribing integration, prior auth APIs
varden_fit: HIGH — Electronic prior auth standards are essential infrastructure. European systems need similar standardized workflows.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Prior auth infrastructure is essential plumbing. European healthcare lacks standardized ePA workflows.
